files.00_Overview.md: Add Key Takeaways section and Learning Objectives. The Concept Check questions are well-structured but need consistent formatting. Add forward/backward navigation links at bottom.
files.01_MESHING_FUNDAMENTALS/01_Introduction_: Excellent structure with Learning Objectives and Key Takeaways. Minor improvement: add cross-references to related sections in other modules. The 3W framework is applied well.
files.01_MESHING_FUNDAMENTALS/02_OpenFOAM_Mesh: Comprehensive content with good Learning Objectives. Add more worked examples for reading mesh files. The Key Takeaways section is well-structured.
files.02_BLOCKMESH_MASTERY/01_BlockMesh_Deep_D: Strong 3W Framework application. Content is extensive but could benefit from splitting into smaller sections. Consider adding quick reference summary tables.
files.02_BLOCKMESH_MASTERY/02_Parametric_Meshi: Excellent practical examples covering M4, Jinja2, and PyFoam. The comparison tables are valuable. Add more troubleshooting tips for common errors.
files.03_SNAPPYHEXMESH_BASICS/01_The_sHM_Workf: Good workflow explanation with diagrams. Add more specific examples of snappyHexMeshDict parameters. The analogy section is helpful for beginners.
files.05_MESH_QUALITY_AND_MANIPULATION/01_Mesh: Strong technical content with clear thresholds. The mermaid diagram for quality criteria is excellent. Consider adding more visual examples of mesh problems.
files.06_RUNTIME_POST_PROCESSING/01_Introducti: Well-structured with practical examples. The workflow diagrams are excellent. Add more examples of function object combinations.

global_strategy: The CONTENT folder demonstrates strong application of the 3W Framework (What/Why/How) throughout most files. Key improvements needed: 1) Standardize Learning Objectives formatting across all files, 2) Ensure every file has Key Takeaways and Concept Check sections, 3) Add more cross-references between related topics, 4) Include more practical worked examples that build from simple to complex, 5) Add troubleshooting sections for common errors. The overview file (00_Overview.md) should serve as a stronger roadmap with clearer learning paths. The use of Thai language combined with English technical terms is well-balanced and should be maintained.
